name: Swordfish Kebobs
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces pineapple chunks, canned, reserve 1/4 cup juice
1 green bell pepper, seeded, cut into 1" squares
1 red onion, peeled, cut into 1" chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine marinade ingredients and pineapple juice in a large bowl. Add swordfish chunks. Let sit for 15 minutes.
2. Soak 8" bamboo skewers in water for 15 minutes.
3. Alternate swordfish and remaining ingredients on skewers.
4. Grill or broil kabobs for 8-10 minutes, rotating for even cooking.
5. Baste with remaining marinade during the last few minutes of grilling or broiling.
